titleStmt.title: SII 17.730: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 730. (A.R. No. 673 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine, in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This records the grant of lands in Mudalaimēḍu alias Parakēsarinallūr in Vaḍa-Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam and made tax-free by the king at the instance of Vāṇādarāyaṉ as dēvadāna and maḍappuṟa-iṛaiyili to the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiyār and to the Tribhuvanavīran-maṭha founded at the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam by Tapasya Kāśyapaṉ, a Śivabrāhmaṉa of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrītribhuvanaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 nāḷ 10 ṉāl koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu kānappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyiluṭaiyār koyiṟ patipāta mulappaṭṭuṭai pañcācāriyaṉ tevakaṉmi māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku cikāriyañ ceyvāṉukku It tevaṟku veṇṭu nivantaṅka
ḷukku yiṟuppatāka vaṭapaiyyūr koṭṭattu Araicūr nilaikkiḻ mutalaimeṭāna parakecarinallūr naṉcai viḷainilattile @ 7 10 2 3/4 veliyum punce viḷai nilattile @ 100 10 3 3 1/20 veliyum Ittevar tevatāna yiṟaiyiliyākavum Ikkoyilil civadvijan tapasyakāśyapaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa nampi Ik koyilil tirumaṭai viḷākattil Eṭutta tiripuvana viran maṭattup
paricārakaṟkum maṭattukku veṇṭuvanattukku Ivvūril kaṇṭamaṭaṅka naṉcey viḷai @ 10 veliyum puṉcey viḷai @ 5 veliyum maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyākavum Ivvūr nattamum cāttappaṉ cerinattamum vaṭukaccāttu nattamum nilam 3 1/4 ca 4 Uḷḷur mādevar cikoyilum tirunantavana @ 2 1/20 tuṟkai cikoyil @ makiḻn=tapa viṟṟiruntāḻvār cikoyilum
tirunantavaṉamum @ tma � � kiḻ 1/2 2 1/20 Ivūr kurukkattip pūṇṭi natta nilam 2 1/20 m makātevar cikoyilun tirunantavana @ 1/20 Eriyāl @ 1/20 9 ta ma � kiḻ va ṅa piṭāriputteri Ammai koyilum tirunantavaṉa nilam � � kiḻ 1/2 2 1/20 keraḷāntakacaturveti maṅkalattu nīr pāyum Āṟṟukālāl @ 1 � ciṟukāṭum karampu @ 10 6 1/4 m ciṟukuḷam 2 10 7
ṉāl @ 7 I pa � kiḻ 1/2 2 1/20 @ m Oṭaikaḷāl 5 � m pavaḷam pampuratteri kovai @ 2 m teṟkil tāṅkalāl @ 2 3 1/20 Ūr Erikarai nir kovai @ 5 10 � � m Atti Aṇṇaṉ Eri @ 3 I pa m cuṭukāṭu @ 3 1/20 m Āka @ 3 100 4 va pa kma Itil Uḷḷūr tevarkaḷ cikoyilum tirunanta ḻivu Iṭṭa nilamuḷpaṭa Ūraṭaṅ kalum tevatānayiṟaiyiliyākavum maṭappuṟa
yiṟaiyiliyākavum Antarāyam pāṭṭam ponnāyam nellāya muḷpaṭa yiṟaiyili peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu yikkoyil civadvijan tapasyakāśyapaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa nampiyaik kāṭṭi vāṇātarāyan namakku coṉnamaiyil yippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac colli taṉak
vaṟku tevatāna yiṟaiyiliyākavum maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyākavum kaikkoṇṭu nivantañ celuttap paṇṇuka Eḻutināṉ tirumantira Olai Irācanārāyaṇa muventaveḷāṉ tiruvāy malarntaruḷinapaṭikku Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻiñcattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaya
cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu . Uḷvarikku Eḻuttiṭṭār puravuvarik kūṟṟukku Ivai vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . puravuvari pottaka nāyakam Ivai ciṟṟāmuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai centamaṅkalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai putuvūru
Digital edition of SII 17.730 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
